pnpm prettier --write {staged_files} && pnpm eslint --cache --fix {staged_files} && pnpm stylelint --fix --allow-empty-input {staged_files}
pnpm run check:circular && pnpm run check:dep && pnpm run check:type && pnpm check:cspell
pnpm exec changeset version && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile

settings.value: Propose a new feature to be added to Vben Admin

attributes.value: Thank you for suggesting a feature for our project! Please fill out the information below to help us understand and implement your request!

attributes.label: Version
attributes.description: What version of our software are you running?

attributes.label: Description
attributes.description: A detailed description of the feature request.
attributes.placeholder: Please describe the feature you would like to see, and why it would be useful.

attributes.label: Proposed Solution
attributes.description: A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
attributes.placeholder: Describe the solution you'd like to see

attributes.label: Alternatives Considered
attributes.description: A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
attributes.placeholder: Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered

attributes.label: Additional Context
attributes.description: Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

attributes.label: Validations
attributes.description: Before submitting the issue, please make sure you do the following

options.label: Ensure the code is up to date. (Some issues have been fixed in the latest version)
I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/issues) and checked that my issue does not duplicate any existing issues.

settings.value: Report an issue with Vben Admin Website to help us make it better.

attributes.value: Thanks for taking the time to fill out this issue!

attributes.label: Explain in Detail
attributes.description: A clear and concise description of your suggestion. If you intend to submit a PR for this issue, tell us in the description. Thanks!
attributes.placeholder: The description of ... page is not clear. I thought it meant ... but it wasn't.

attributes.label: Steps to reproduce
attributes.description: Please provide any reproduction steps that may need to be described. E.g. if it happens only when running the dev or build script make sure it's clear which one to use.
attributes.placeholder: Run `pnpm install` followed by `pnpm run docs:dev`

settings.value: Report an issue with Vben Admin to help us make it better.

attributes.value: Thanks for taking the time to fill out this bug report!

attributes.label: Version
attributes.description: What version of our software are you running?

attributes.label: Describe the bug?
attributes.description: A clear and concise description of what the bug is. If you intend to submit a PR for this issue, tell us in the description. Thanks!

attributes.label: Reproduction
attributes.description: Please provide a link to [StackBlitz](https://stackblitz.com/fork/github/vitest-dev/vitest/tree/main/examples/basic?initialPath=__vitest__/) (you can also use [examples](https://github.com/vitest-dev/vitest/tree/main/examples)) or a github repo that can reproduce the problem you ran into. A [minimal reproduction](https://stackoverflow.com/help/minimal-reproducible-example) is required unless you are absolutely sure that the issue is obvious and the provided information is enough to understand the problem. If a report is vague (e.g. just a generic error message) and has no reproduction, it will receive a "needs reproduction" label. If no reproduction is provided after 3 days, it will be auto-closed.

attributes.label: Relevant log output
attributes.description: Please copy and paste any relevant log output. This will be automatically formatted into code, so no need for backticks.

attributes.label: Validations
attributes.description: Before submitting the issue, please make sure you do the following

options.label: Ensure the code is up to date. (Some issues have been fixed in the latest version)
I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/issues) and checked that my issue does not duplicate any existing issues.
Check that this is a concrete bug. For Q&A open a [GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/vbenjs/vue-vben-admin/discussions) or join our [Discord Chat Server](https://discord.gg/8GuAdwDhj6).
The provided reproduction is a [minimal reproducible example](https://stackoverflow.com/help/minimal-reproducible-example) of the bug.

settings.value:
跳转到当前路由时，需要激活的菜单路径。
当不在导航菜单中显示时，需要指定激活路径
该路径未能找到有效的菜单
通过点击图片中的特定位置来验证用户身份。
验证码图片（支持img标签src属性值）
提示图片（支持img标签src属性值）
验证码图片宽度 默认300px
验证码图片高度 默认220px
The path could not find a valid menu

When jumping to the current route, 
the menu path that needs to be activated must be specified when it does not display in the navigation menu.
Verify user identity by clicking on specific locations in the image.
Captcha Image (supports img tag src attribute value)
Hint Image (supports img tag src attribute value)
